subcodes.first_line: O pilgrim of the blessed Threshold! Praise be to God that thou didst attain, and wert confirmed in kissing the sacred Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زائر عتبه مبارکه حمد کن خدا را که موفق شدی و بتقبیل آستان مقدس موید گردیدی
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God
